name: nncckkrr.space
notes: v39.3.22d variety/feel hotfix: gates EXIT OPEN moments to actually-active portals, queues full-screen moments, starts kill combo UI at 25+ kills with slower combo windows, uses pixel-terminal center text, removes TAB scrollbar, shows per-dash recharge cells, adds loop-change moments, modest loop HP scaling, and speeds up small splitter children.
